untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires identification of two distinct price peaks at approximately the same level and a valley between them. This requires multi-bar pattern recognition (peak/valley detection) which cannot be expressed using only single-bar indicators and allowed operators. The signal also requires measuring distance from valley to first peak for target calculation, which requires historical peak/valley coordinates not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: The Double Top pattern is inherently a multi-bar formation requiring: (1) detection of two peaks at similar levels, (2) identification of the valley between them as a confirmation point, and (3) measurement calculations from valley to peak. While a simplified proxy using pivot points as a breakout reference was attempted, it does not capture the true double top structure. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection logic outside the scope of indicator-based rules. Recommend implementing as a specialized pattern detector rather than a rule-based condition set.
